name: IngestStateStore
description: Separate owner-only raw-SQLite state supporting immutable review, recovery, compaction, and safe cleanup.
schema_def: ingest_batch(batch_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, source_fingerprint TEXT NOT NULL, selected_account_id TEXT NOT NULL, adapter_identity TEXT NOT NULL, ledger_contract_version TEXT NOT NULL, manifest_schema_version TEXT NOT NULL, period_start TEXT, period_end TEXT, status INTEGER NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL)

manifest_revision(manifest_revision_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES ingest_batch, revision_number INTEGER NOT NULL, canonical_digest TEXT NOT NULL, committable INTEGER NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, UNIQUE(batch_id, revision_number))

source_record_outcome(manifest_revision_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES manifest_revision, source_record_id TEXT NOT NULL, record_order INTEGER NOT NULL, disposition INTEGER NOT NULL, reason_code TEXT NOT NULL, candidate_id TEXT, prior_canonical_ref TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(manifest_revision_id, source_record_id))

import_candidate(candidate_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, manifest_revision_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES manifest_revision, source_record_id TEXT NOT NULL, immutable_facts_json TEXT NOT NULL, frozen_ledger_request_json TEXT NOT NULL, idempotency_key TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, commit_state INTEGER NOT NULL)

reconciliation_control(manifest_revision_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES manifest_revision, control_order INTEGER NOT NULL, kind INTEGER NOT NULL, availability INTEGER NOT NULL, evidence_json TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(manifest_revision_id, control_order))

manifest_approval(approval_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, manifest_revision_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES manifest_revision, manifest_digest TEXT NOT NULL, actor TEXT NOT NULL, trusted_os_identity TEXT NOT NULL, approved_at TEXT NOT NULL, active INTEGER NOT NULL)
import_receipt(receipt_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES ingest_batch, status INTEGER NOT NULL, summary_json TEXT NOT NULL, completed_at TEXT)

candidate_receipt(receipt_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES import_receipt, candidate_id TEXT NOT NULL, outcome INTEGER NOT NULL, ledger_transaction_id TEXT, error_code TEXT, attempted_at TEXT, terminal_at TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(receipt_id, candidate_id))

All identifiers are stable text; enums persist as constrained integers with source-generated contract names. Foreign keys are ON, WAL and synchronous FULL are required, and PRAGMA user_version controls immutable migrations.
